question: Which region has the largest number of buildings? Show me the capital of the region.
sql: SELECT r.Capital FROM region r JOIN building b ON r.Region_ID = b.Region_ID GROUP BY r.Region_ID ORDER BY COUNT(b.Building_ID) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 获取每个地区的首府，按该地区内建筑数量降序排列，并返回建筑数量最多的那个地区的首府

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题的意图，即找出建筑数量最多的地区并返回其首府。
